seoTitle: How to Make Name Label Stickers in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to make name label stickers in Canva, using printable sticker templates you can customize for kids, classrooms, or products.
intro: Name label stickers are a practical Canva project for parents labeling school supplies, teachers organizing classrooms, or small businesses branding products. Since the source description for this one is brief, the steps below stay at a general, easy-to-follow level covering Canva's sticker workflow.

steps.heading: Search for sticker or label templates
steps.body: Look for 'name label' or 'sticker' templates in Canva's search bar to find a suitable starting layout.

steps.heading: Choose a repeatable label size
steps.body: Pick a template with a grid layout so multiple labels can be printed on one sheet.

steps.heading: Add the name and any icons
steps.body: Type in the name text and add small icons or decorations to personalize each label.

steps.heading: Duplicate for multiple names
steps.body: Copy the label design and swap in different names if you need a full sheet.

steps.heading: Export and print on sticker paper
steps.body: Download the design as a PDF and print onto sticker sheets sized for your labels.

faq.question: Do I need special paper to print these stickers?
faq.answer: Yes, printable sticker paper (available at most office supply stores) works best for a clean, peelable result.

faq.question: Can I make a whole sheet of different names at once?
faq.answer: Yes, by duplicating the label element multiple times on one page and editing each name individually.

faq.question: Is there a free template for name labels in Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva offers free sticker and label templates alongside Pro options.

faq.question: Can I resize labels to fit a specific sticker sheet?
faq.answer: Yes, you can adjust the size of each label element to match the dimensions of your printable sticker paper.
